```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(targets)

tar_config_set(
  store = "../_targets"
)

library(tidyverse)

# baseline retenue pour le texte principal
model_suffix <- "A"

get_object <- function(objet){
  objet |>   
    str_c(model_suffix, sep = "_") |> 
    targets::tar_read_raw()
}

# intro
p_intro_top <- tar_read(p_intro_top_communes_lfi)
p_intro_compare <- tar_read(p_intro_compare_euro_muni)

# modèle
base_cf <- tar_read(base_cf)
modele <- get_object(objet = "model_fit")

# résidus
residual_summary <- get_object("residual_summary_pretty")
residual_summary_weighted <- get_object("residual_summary_weighted")
p_residual_hist <- get_object("p_residual_hist")
p_residuals_vs_euro <- get_object("p_residuals_vs_euro")

# ranef
ranef_summary <- get_object("ranef_summary")
ranef_tail <- get_object("ranef_tail_pretty")
p_ranef_distribution <- get_object("p_ranef_distribution")
plot_intercept_slope <- get_object("plot_intercept_slope")
p_top_ranef <- get_object("p_top_ranef")
p_bottom_ranef <- get_object("p_bottom_ranef")

# comparaisons de modèles
model_A <- tar_read(model_fit_A)
model_B <- tar_read(model_fit_B)
model_C_full <- tar_read(model_fit_C_full)
model_C_no_VIF <- tar_read(model_fit_C_no_VIF)
model_C_ortho <- tar_read(model_fit_C_ortho)
```
